summary: Frontend testing of KNOW_MIRA_SUMMARY system. Found 1 CRITICAL bug: Soul score discrepancy (87% on preboarding vs 53% on KNOW_MORE_START). All navigation flows work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Soul score shows 53% but should show 87% (same as preboarding). Uses `soulScore` (calculated) instead of `currentSoulScore` (database)

action_items: FIX: In SoulBuilder.jsx KNOW_MORE_START screen (lines 2040, 2059), replace `soulScore` with `currentSoulScore` to show consistent database score
VERIFY: The save function at line 482 sends calculatedScore to backend - ensure backend merges with existing score correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Line 371: `soulScore` is calculated from local `answers` state which doesn't count all DB answers
Lines 2040, 2059: KNOW_MORE_START uses wrong score variable (`soulScore` instead of `currentSoulScore`)
Question deduplication is working correctly (27 remaining unanswered questions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The soul score display issue is localized to KNOW_MORE_START screen in SoulBuilder.jsx. The fix is straightforward: change `soulScore` to `currentSoulScore` on lines 2040 and 2059. All other flows (See Pet's Home, Save & exit, Continue to questions) work correctly.

features_verified.know_mira_summary_screen: PASS - Shows pet photo, 87% soul score, top 3 traits, 6 synopsis bullets
features_verified.know_more_start_screen: PARTIAL - Shows synopsis and 27 remaining questions, BUT soul score shows 53% instead of 87%
features_verified.continue_button: PASS - Goes to next unanswered question (no repeats)
features_verified.save_and_exit: PASS - Persists progress and navigates to Pet Home
features_verified.pet_home_loads_correctly: PASS - Shows correct pet context and 87% soul score
features_verified.multi_pet_selector: PASS - Shows 12 pets with individual scores

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Soul score discrepancy: 87% on preboarding, 53% on KNOW_MORE_START
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: KNOW_MORE_START screen uses `soulScore` (line 2040, 2059) which is calculated from local `answers` state using calculateSoulScore(). This function only counts questions whose IDs exist in CHAPTERS array. However, the database has 56 pre-filled answers with different question IDs (like 'name', 'breed', 'weight') that don't exist in CHAPTERS, so they aren't counted. The preboarding screen correctly uses `currentSoulScore` which comes from `primaryPet.overall_score` (database value = 87%).
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Replace `soulScore` with `currentSoulScore` on lines 2040 and 2059 in SoulBuilder.jsx
reproduction_steps: Observe 53% Soul on KNOW_MORE_START screen (should be 87%)
